code: import axios from'axios';const TOKEN_KEY='lms_token';export function getAuthToken(){return localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);}export function setAuthToken(token){if(token){localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,token);return;}localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);}axios.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=getAuthToken();if(token){config.headers=config.headers||{};config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});
